response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this client-facing role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies including Linux, DLang, Node.js, and Docker
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and knowledge sharing in developer communities
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of the required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML expertise, architectural design leadership, or formal project management experience
Lacks documented experience leading interdisciplinary teams or advising clients on security/compliance
